typography_rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-black tracking-tighter text-slate-900 leading-tight
typography_rules.data_metric: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-mono font-medium tracking-tight text-slate-900
typography_rules.label_overline: text-xs font-mono font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-500
typography_rules.general: Do not center align unless absolutely necessary. Left-align text and inputs. Right-align numerical data in tables.

spacing_and_layout.density: Tight density for dashboards. Base grid gap: gap-4 or gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strict left-alignment for text. Right-alignment for numbers in tables.
spacing_and_layout.structure: Sidebar (collapsible or fixed) + Main Content Area. Use standard Tailwind grids (grid-cols-12).

surfaces.headers: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200 sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces.inputs: bg-white border border-slate-300 rounded-none focus:border-[#0033CC] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0033CC] shadow-sm transition-colors
surfaces.buttons: rounded-none font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-sm transition-colors shadow-none

charts.style: Minimalist axes, clear tooltips. Use Signal Red for deficits/gaps, International Klein Blue for supply/coverage.
charts.types: Line charts for Gap Analysis over intervals, Bar charts for Shiftwise Count.

badges.style: rounded-none px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono font-bold uppercase

motion.philosophy: Utilitarian and rapid. No bouncy effects. State changes only.
motion.hover: Instant color swaps or subtle 150ms opacity fades.

icons.style: Regular or Bold weight, technical, clear.

abstract_background_url.description: Abstract pattern of wavy grey lines on white background
abstract_background_url.usage: Use sparingly as a watermark or empty-state background if visual interest is needed without cluttering the data.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for all text.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_ids: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, table rows) MUST include `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case (e.g., `data-testid="upload-csv-button"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `ibm-plex` fonts or import via Google Fonts: `@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600;700&family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap');` in CSS.
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for structural layout and Shadcn UI components for complex interactions.
Customize Shadcn components by removing rounded corners (`rounded-none`) and enforcing harsh borders.
For tables with massive data (Agent Roster, 212 rows), ensure horizontal scroll and sticky headers.
SLA Calculation view should highlight metrics clearly using `font-mono`.
Use Phosphor icons for all iconography.
